item.title: The systemd project Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: The systemd project Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsJune 16, 2026The systemd projectis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for all components from the systemd project, including systemd, udev, systemd-journald, systemd-resolved, systemd-boot, systemd-stub, mkosi, and other components maintained onhttps://github.com/systemd.

item.title: Secur0 Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Secur0 Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsJune 16, 2026Secur0is now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for vulnerabilities identified by Secur0 or third parties in the programs listed athttps://app.secur0.com/programs.

item.title: Yogesh Mittal of Red Hat Joins CVE Board
item.description: Yogesh Mittal of Red Hat Joins CVE BoardblogBy CVE Program|June 23, 2026TheCVE Programis pleased to welcome Yogesh Mittal ofRed Hatas the newest member of theCVE Board. Yogesh brings nearly 20 years of experience to the CVE Board, offering a unique perspective that bridges the gap between enterprise vulnerability consumers and open-source suppliers.

item.title: Verizon Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Verizon Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsJune 23, 2026Verizonis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for all Verizon products and services.

item.title: VulNow Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: VulNow Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsJune 30, 2026VulNowis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for vulnerabilities observed by, discovered by, or reported to VulNow that are not in another CNA’s scope.

item.title: Call for Topics for “CVE and AI Vulnerability Discovery” Virtual Conference on July 30, 2026
item.description: Call for Topics for “CVE and AI Vulnerability Discovery” Virtual Conference on July 30, 2026blogBy CVE Program|June 30, 2026

item.title: Lindsey Cerkovnik of CISA Joins the CVE Board as the “CISA CVE Board Liaison”
item.description: Lindsey Cerkovnik of CISA Joins the CVE Board as the “CISA CVE Board Liaison”blogBy CVE Program|July 7, 2026TheCVE Programis pleased to announce that Lindsey Cerkovnik of theCybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA)is the newest member of theCVE Board, serving as the “CISA CVE Board Liaison.”

item.title: Vulnerability Data Enrichment for CVE Records: 268 CNAs on the Enrichment Recognition List for July 6, 2026
item.description: Vulnerability Data Enrichment for CVE Records: 268 CNAs on the Enrichment Recognition List for July 6, 2026blogBy CVE Program|July 7, 2026

item.title: Bull Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Bull Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsJuly 7, 2026Bull SASis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for products and technologies branded by Bull and its subsidiaries, unless covered by the scope of another CNA as well as vulnerabilities in third-party software and hardware discovered by Bull and its subsidiaries that are not in another CNA’s scope.

item.title: The illumos project Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: The illumos project Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsJuly 7, 2026The illumos projectis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for theillumos-gate repositoryand related downstream distributions such asOpenIndiana,SmartOS, andOmniOS.
